CustomField.description: Six-digit NAICS code of the project sponsor's primary business activity. Used by the CE Screener as a secondary signal to route to the correct agency CE namespace and apply confidence modifiers (NAICS 211/212 → Low confidence). Not a primary CE classifier.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Applicant NAICS code (6 digits). Used to route CE namespace and flag high-risk industries.
CustomField.label: Applicant NAICS Code
